Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: under-relaxed Newton-GS Jacobian for GPU multigrid stability

8-color Gauss-Seidel on GPU races with 6th-order stencil (radius 3):
same-color points at distance 2 overlap in each other's stencils.
Fix: keep 6th-order fd_d2 Laplacian in smoother for accurate residual,
but use 2nd-order center weight (-2.0 vs -49/18) in Newton step
denominator. Under-relaxation factor ~0.735 damps racy-read
perturbations while maintaining correct descent direction.

Removed unused fd_d2_smooth/fd_d2_mixed_smooth functions and local
shadowing definitions. All 73 solver tests pass (33 BY + 26 HiSpID
+ 14 AMR-MG).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add SwiftData dual-write to game importer (rebase on develop) (#2566)

- Rebased on develop after merging SwiftData Tasks 2 & 3
- Add GameImporterSwiftDataBridge: mirrors Realm PVGame writes into
  SwiftData Game_Data via upsert with true-mirror applyFields semantics
- Add importer helpers to SwiftDataDatabaseDriver: init(container:),
  newBackgroundContext(), games(withMD5:in:), system(identifier:in:)
- Hook SwiftData dual-write into GameImporterDatabaseService at:
  saveGame (await after Realm context exits, no Task.detached),
  deferred metadata update task, artwork download task, local scan fix
- Remove all #if canImport(SwiftData) guards (min OS bumped to support
  SwiftData on all platforms per abaee18be)
- Address all Copilot review issues: no fatalError on container failure,
  game(identifier:) queries md5Hash, Task.detached replaced with await,
  artwork/file relationships updated in-place to avoid orphans,
  applyFields is a true mirror (propagates nil/empty to clear stale data)

Part of #2510

commit.message:
Fix SENSEX straddle: wrong BFO futures symbol was returning SENSEX 50 chain

Root cause: formatFuturesSymbol for BFO generated SENSEX5026MARFUT (SENSEX 50
index, ~28000) instead of SENSEX26MARFUT (regular SENSEX, ~79000). The
GetOptionChain API returned SENSEX 50 options whose strikes (~28500) never
matched the ATM strike (~79500), producing all-zero prices.

Fixes:
- Remove erroneous '50' from BFO futures symbol format
- Reorder BFO symbol attempts: try weekly option symbol first, then monthly,
  then futures as fallback (futures always returns monthly chain regardless
  of requested expiry)

feat: 시맨틱 키워드 매칭 완성 + 프론트엔드 점수 구조 수정

[백엔드 - nlp_engine.py]
- SBERT 2글자 한국어 임베딩 붕괴 문제 해결: 단어↔단어 → 구문 레벨 비교로 전환
- _build_comparison_phrases(): 3자+ 단어 + 바이그램 + 트라이그램 생성
- _KEYWORD_SIM_THRESHOLD: 0.72 → 0.60 (구문 레벨 기준값)
- 시맨틱 키워드 매칭 3단계: 정확매칭 → 형태소공유 → SBERT 구문 비교
- snunlp/KR-SBERT-Medium 평가 후 기각, jhgan/ko-sroberta-multitask 유지

[프론트엔드 - lib/api.ts, hooks/useAgentStream.ts]
- RuleMetadata에 per_criterion_rule_scores, rule_base_total 필드 추가
- EvaluatorResult에 original_llm_score, rule_ratio, original_llm_total 추가
- HitlReadyData에 grand_total, rule_base_total, per_criterion_rule_scores 추가

[프론트엔드 - components/grading/hitl-panel.tsx]
- EnsembleDetailSection 전면 재작성:
  - Rule 기여(10%) = 0.1 × rule_ratio × max_score (점수 단위)
  - 모델별 원본 LLM 점수 표시, 합산 컬럼(≤ max_score 보장)
  - 2개+ 모델일 때 LLM 평균 컬럼 추가
- 교사 검수 / 최종 결과 카드 점수 구조 수정:
  - rule_base_total(비율 합산)을 ensemble_score에 가산하던 버그 제거
  - Rule 기여 / LLM 기여 분해 표시, 최종 합계 = ensemble_score / total_score

[문서]
- handoff.md: 점수 구조 아키텍처 설명 섹션 추가, 버그 이력 갱신
- claude.md: 섹션 5-2 HITL 패널 UI 스펙 업데이트

fix: address Grok 4.2 security board review (4 critical fixes)

1. SSRF prevention: enforce HTTPS on GOLEM_API_URL via Zod refine
2. Defense-in-depth: encodeURIComponent on ALL path segments, not just workerName
3. Fix invokeAgent → invokeWorker using documented /invoke-and-await endpoint
4. Sanitize error text (truncate to 200 chars) to prevent backend leakage
5. Wrap resource handler in try/catch (same pattern as tool handler)
6. Handle 204 No Content responses gracefully

commit.message:
fix: suppress unhandled RPC rate-limit rejections to prevent process crash

The public Base Mainnet RPC returns -32014 'maximum 10 calls in 1 batch'
on eth_getLogs polling requests. These throw as unhandled rejections and
crash the Node.js process after the healthcheck passes.

Add a global unhandledRejection handler that silences known public-RPC
polling errors while still logging unexpected errors.

fix: 7 telemetry-identified problems from 148-search analysis

P1: Raise default cap 20→50 (49% of searches hit cap, zero I/O cost)
P2: Detect all retry chain types in --usage (not just empty→found)
P3: Semantic search threshold 0.3→0.55 + skip file re-read when no context

commit.message:
Extend ROADMAP with mathematics primer side quest (M1–M9)

Nine primer series covering the full path from algebra to calculus,
linear algebra, and probability — designed as a motivationally-grounded
ante-room to the geography curriculum rather than a standalone math course.

M1 — Numbers, units, and algebra
M2 — Geometry and trigonometry (including spherical)
M3 — Functions, exponentials, and logarithms
M4 — Pre-calculus: rates of change
M5 — Differential calculus
M6 — Integral calculus and differential equations
M7 — Multivariable calculus
M8 — Linear algebra for spatial thinkers
M9 — Probability and statistics for environmental modellers

Each series uses geographic anchors (DEMs, glacier retreat, watershed
area, satellite spectra) to motivate every concept before defining it.
Includes cross-link table from geography series to primer prerequisites
and design notes on interactive visualisation and practice problems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Move GuideProvider inside ErrorBoundary to prevent white flash on nav

GuideProvider (which calls useLocation + useNavigate) was sitting ABOVE
the ErrorBoundary. If it threw during navigation, React 19 unmounted the
entire root since no ErrorBoundary could catch it — causing a full white
flash. Now it's safely inside the ErrorBoundary.

Also key inner ErrorBoundaries by pathname so they auto-reset on route
changes instead of showing stale error screens.

* feat(desktop): bundle MinGit so Windows users don't need Git installed

- Add download-mingit.ps1 script to fetch MinGit at CI build time

* feat(desktop): add export button for roles and tools with v2 path support

Add export buttons to RoleDetailPanel and ToolDetailPanel for non-system
resources. Fix resources:download handler to resolve v2 role paths from
~/.rolex/roles/<id>/ and wrap v2 ZIP contents in a roleId-prefixed
directory so import correctly restores the original ID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(desktop): use Electron Helper binary on macOS to prevent Dock icon flicker

On macOS, spawning process.execPath (the main Electron binary) as child
processes causes each subprocess to briefly show a Dock icon. Use the
Electron Helper binary instead, which has LSUIElement=true in its
Info.plist and is invisible to the Dock. Also add windowsHide:true to
all spawn calls for Windows.

read properties of undefined" error when clicking Git download link.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(core): complete RoleX 1.1.0 integration with all 32 operations

Implement full RoleX 1.1.0 API support with complete operation coverage.

Core changes:
- Migrate all RolexBridge methods to RoleX 1.1.0 API
- Add 14 new operations: reflect, realize, master, forget, skill,
  retire, die, rehire, train, charter, dissolve, charge, require, abolish
- Fix isV2Role() to query SQLite database instead of filesystem
- Update RoleProtocol to handle v2: prefix for database-backed roles
- Fix listV2Roles() to parse census.list string format

MCP server updates:
- Expand action tool from 18 to 32 operations
- Add v2 role checks to recall/remember tools
- Update inputSchema with new parameters

Operations now supported:
- Learning cycle: reflect → realize → master → skill → forget
- Organization: found → charter → hire → fire → dissolve
- Position: establish → charge → require → appoint → dismiss → abolish
- Individual lifecycle: born → train → retire → rehire → die
- Goal execution: want → plan → todo → finish → achieve/abandon

Dependencies:
- Add @rolexjs/genesis@1.1.0 for world initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(desktop): add organization tree view for V2 roles and fix census parser

- Add RoleTreeListPanel component with hierarchical organization display
- Parse census.list text output to structured JSON data
- Distinguish between role assignments and position definitions
- Show organizations with expandable/collapsible nodes
- Display role positions as badges
- Group independent roles separately
- Fix V2GoalsTab to handle text-format focus output
- Add rolex:directory IPC handler for organization data
- Add i18n keys for independent roles

Breaking changes:
- V2 role list now shows tree structure instead of flat list
- Organizations without members are not displayed in tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): migrate V2 role Structure tab from filesystem to database

Changed V2StructureTab to load identity nodes from RoleX 1.1.0 SQLite
database instead of reading .feature files from filesystem.

Changes:
- Added rolex:getIdentityNodes IPC handler calling RolexBridge.identity()
- Rewrote V2StructureTab to work with database nodes instead of files
- Nodes categorized by name/id patterns (persona/knowledge/voice/experience)
- Viewer displays node.information (Gherkin content) directly
- Removed file editing (database nodes are read-only in UI)

This completes the RoleX 1.1.0 migration for V2 role detail pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): correct RolexBridge import path in rolex:getIdentityNodes

Fixed "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getInstance')" error
by using correct import path: core.rolex.RolexBridge instead of
destructuring RolexBridge directly from require('@promptx/core').

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): use getRolexBridge() instead of RolexBridge.getInstance()

RolexBridge uses getRolexBridge() function for singleton pattern,
not a static getInstance() method on the class.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): parse role.project() text output into structured nodes

role.project() returns rendered Gherkin text, not structured data.
Added parser to extract nodes from text using ## [type] (id) markers.

Changes:
- Parse identity text by splitting on ## markers
- Extract node type, id, and content from each section
- Categorize nodes by type (identity/procedure → persona/knowledge)
- Display node type badge in UI
- Added debug logging to troubleshoot data format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(core): restrict remember/recall commands to V1 roles only

V2 roles use RoleX memory system (reflect/realize/master) instead of
traditional cognition system (remember/recall). Added version check to
prevent V2 roles from using remember/recall commands.

Changes:
- Added isV2Role check in RememberCommand.assembleLayers()
- Added isV2Role check in RecallCommand.assembleLayers()
- Return helpful error message directing users to RoleX commands
- Graceful fallback if version check fails (backward compatibility)

Rationale:
- V2 roles store data in RoleX SQLite database
- V1 roles use ~/.promptx/cognition/ for memory storage
- Mixing systems would cause data inconsistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(core): show organization and position info for V2 roles in discover

Enhanced discover command to display V2 roles with their organization
and position information from RoleX directory.

Changes:
- Added loadDirectoryData() in DiscoverCommand to fetch org structure
- Added parseDirectoryOutput() to parse directory JSON output
- Modified RoleListArea to accept directoryData parameter
- Added getOrganizationInfo() to lookup role's org and position
- V2 roles now display as: "roleId [V2]: name (org - position)"

Example output:
- `Node全栈工程师` [V2]: Node全栈工程师 (火花堆栈人工智能有限公司 -
  Node全栈工程师岗位) → action({ operation: "activate", ... })

nexus chat now supports all three AI providers. Anthropic keeps full
tool mode (real actions via tool use). Gemini and Ollama get a streaming
advisory REPL that answers questions and suggests the exact `nexus` CLI
commands for any action the user wants to take.

Key additions:
- offline_chat_system_prompt() in ai.py — system prompt with project
  snapshot, advisory persona, and CLI command examples
- _run_offline_chat() in commands/chat.py — streaming REPL with history
  windowing (default: last 6 exchange pairs), /clear command, /context
  refresh, clean EOF/interrupt handling
- _run_tool_chat() extracted from chat_cmd for clarity
- Mode banner: "Full tool mode" (Anthropic) vs "Advisory mode" (Gemini/Ollama)
- 37 new tests in test_chat_offline.py (766 total, 0 warnings)
- test_chat_gemini_only_exits_with_message updated to expect success

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: nexus
repository.description: Local-first CLI project and task intelligence tool.

commit.message:
Fix recovery deep link: set _recoveryInProgress flag before setSession

When app is already open on forgot-password screen, SIGNED_IN fires during
setSession and the navigation effect was redirecting to tabs before
_navigateToResetPassword could fire. Flag is set synchronously (before the
first await) so it's guaranteed true when the navigation effect runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix TypeError in release notes generation for null author fields

Guard both PR fetches against non-list JSON responses and null author
fields that caused "unhashable type: dict" when gh CLI returns
unexpected output for the merged:<date search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: axm2snipe
repository.description: Sync devices from Apple Business Manager (ABM) and Apple School Manager (ASM) into Snipe-IT asset management

commit.message:
fix(analytics): use navigation events for flow map, not just page_view

The app is a SPA where internal views (Dashboard, Flights, Miles, etc.)
all stay at URL /. Only page_view events fire on URL changes, so the
flow map was empty. Now the DB functions combine both page_view and
navigation events (which carry to_view in event_data) to build the
complete user flow graph. Also adds friendly labels for all view states.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
